About kyu.clareon.live

A student-built resource hub for Kyambogo University students.

What is this site?

kyu.clareon.live is a free resource hub built by a new student at Kyambogo University. It's designed to help students access:

  • Past papers with answer guides
  • Practice quizzes with instant feedback
  • Study materials and revision resources
  • A community of fellow Kyambogo students

Everything on this site is completely free and accessible to all Kyambogo students.

Who built this?

Student

Creater

I'm a first-year student at Kyambogo University. I built this site to help fellow students access study resources easily and connect with each other. I'm passionate about using technology to solve real problems and make learning more accessible.

Why build this?

As a Kyambogo student, I notice that accessing past papers and revision materials will be challenging. Students are often scattered across various platforms or links, making it hard to find reliable resources. I want to create a central hub where everyone can easily access the materials they need.

My goal is to make studying easier and more effective for all Kyambogo students. I'm starting with a few programs and plan to expand to cover more courses over time.

What's coming next?

  • More past papers for all programs
  • Additional mcq episodes with detailed feedback
  • User accounts to track progress
  • Support for more schools at Kyambogo
  • Mobile app for offline access

Stay tuned! Join our WhatsApp channel for updates on new resources.

Disclaimer: This site is not affiliated with Kyambogo University. It is a student-built resource hub created to help fellow students. All materials shared are for educational purposes only.

Site is still being constructed — this is a clean revision template.

2026 — Kyambogo Student Hub
